response.original_title: Ecología y Medio Ambiente en los Andes
response.overview: This documentary is the result of at least eight years of monitoring and research into the indiscriminate proliferation of eucalyptus trees in Peru, largely with the complicity of the authorities themselves. Our perspective is that eucalyptus, a major predator and degrader of the environment, has increased and continues to increase criminally in our country, while in Europe, for example, where we lived for over eight years, it is prohibited and its cultivation is restricted.
response.title: Ecología y Medio Ambiente en los Andes
